reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) High price with bad service....a necessary evil for those crossing the Jama Pass.

(Original)
Preço alto com serviço ruim....mal necessário para quem cruza o passo Jama
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSLU5XeV93RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención del personal de aduana,rápido, cordial.

(Translated by Google)
The customs staff provided excellent service, quick and friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSd09PNGNnEAE

reviews.comment:

Good for the location they are in the middle of the puna

Beautiful view.

reviews.comment:
Entes o después de pasar la frontera por Jama.  Lugar ideal para cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
Before or after crossing the border at Jama. Ideal place to refuel
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSM09QSWtRRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) A mandatory stop before facing Customs (2-3 hours), take the opportunity to grab a coffee and use the restroom. Very good service station and staff.

(Original)
Parada obrigatória antes de enfrentar a Aduana de 2 a 3 horas, já aproveita e tome um café e use o banheiro, muito bom posto e funcionários
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSdEpXTlZnEAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) YPF standard. Good service, good price, and quick processing. Very convenient.

(Original)
Padrão YPF. Bom Atendimento, preço bom e agilidade no processo. Conveniência muito boa.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSNE5uVEhBEAE

reviews.comment:
bien ubicado, pero con problemas al momento de querer pagar, y pocas opciones de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Well located, but with problems when trying to pay, and few fuel options.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURobDRmSk1BEAE

reviews.comment:

(Original)
Mal atendido e sempre falta combustível

reviews.comment:
Tienen sistema para cobrar con tarjeta pero "no tienen" para dar ticker....

(Translated by Google)
They have a system for card payments but "they don't have" one for issuing tickets....
